basics.name: Shyam Charan Kesavamoorthi
basics.label: Robotics Researcher
basics.summary: An undergraduate researcher specializing in robot learning, skill imitation, and legged robots.

work.name: Multi-Agent Robotic Motion Laboratory, NUS
work.summary: Developing a general loco-manipulation policy by combining imitation learning and reinforcement learning techniques.
highlights: Developing loco-manipulation policies using Imitation and Reinforcement Learning.
Training and evaluating policies in IsaacLab with sim2sim transfer to MuJoCo.
Selected for funded on-site research term (Jan 2026) based on remote performance.

work.name: DACAS Lab, IISc Bangalore
work.summary: Developed conditional diffusion models for multi-step uncertainty prediction in quadrotor residual dynamics.
highlights: Developed conditional diffusion models for uncertainty prediction.
Conducted structured experiments evaluating data efficiency and inference latency.
Analyzed tradeoffs for deploying generative models in real-time robotics.

work.name: Thryv Mobility
work.summary: Designed PCBs and embedded systems for next-generation mobility applications.
highlights: Designed PCBs for digital/analog circuits including buck converters.
Implemented I2C/SPI drivers for LIS3DH accelerometers.
Developed embedded systems using ESP-IDF framework and BLE protocols.

projects.name: EdVisor
highlights: Built an assistive device using Raspberry Pi Zero and NVIDIA Jetson Nano.
Implemented hand gesture-based ROI extraction for text selection.
Fine-tuning Small Language Models (SLMs) for textbook information processing.

projects.name: Luminosity Drone
highlights: Developed OpenCV algorithms for real-time organism detection from drone feed.
Implemented and optimized a PID controller for precise drone navigation.
Simulated drone behavior in Gazebo using ROS 1.
